description: The Colombo crime family is an Italian American Mafia crime family and one of the Five Families of New York City. Founded in 1928 by Joe Profaci, it is the youngest of the Five Families and has a history of instability and infighting, including three internal wars. The family engages in racketeering, gambling, loansharking, extortion, drug trafficking, and other criminal activities. It remains active, though weakened by leadership turnover and prosecutions.

country_links.evidence_quote: Dino 'Little Dino' Saracino — born in 1972 in Castellammare del Golfo , Sicily
country_links.context: Dino Saracino, a Colombo family soldier, was born in Castellammare del Golfo, Sicily, Italy, indicating the family's recruitment from Italy.

country_links.evidence_quote: Bronx - Dennis 'Fat Dennis' DeLucia — capo with gambling operations in the Bronx.
country_links.context: The Colombo crime family operates in multiple U.S. states including New York, Florida, and Massachusetts, with members involved in extortion, gambling, loansharking, and other crimes.
